goal:
🔄 delegate to reviewer: Verify the checkFileSize read-fix in the pi orchestrator extension at ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/.

1. Read scope-guard.ts — confirm checkFileSize has `operation?: string` parameter and early return for reads
2. Read subagent-tool-guard.ts — confirm checkFileSize call passes operation parameter
3. Read check-filesize-read-fix.test.ts — confirm test cases exist
4. Run: `cd /Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && unset PI_ORCHESTRATOR_SUBAGENT && npx vitest run check-filesize-read-fix.test.ts`
5. Run: `cd /Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && unset PI_ORCHESTRATOR_SUBAGENT && npx vitest run` — confirm 0 failures
6. Run: `cd /Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && git diff --stat` — show changed files
7. Run: `git log --oneline -3` — check if committed

Report: what changed, test results, whether it's committed.

steps.label:
Reviewer: Verify the checkFileSize read-fix in the pi orchestrator extension at ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator/.

1. Read scope-guard.ts — confirm checkFileSize has `operation?: string` parameter and early return for reads
2. Read subagent-tool-guard.ts — confirm checkFileSize call passes operation parameter
3. Read check-filesize-read-fix.test.ts — confirm test cases exist
4. Run: `cd /Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && unset PI_ORCHESTRATOR_SUBAGENT && npx vitest run check-filesize-read-fix.test.ts`
5. Run: `cd /Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && unset PI_ORCHESTRATOR_SUBAGENT && npx vitest run` — confirm 0 failures
6. Run: `cd /Users/shivam94/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && git diff --stat` — show changed files
7. Run: `git log --oneline -3` — check if committed

Report: what changed, test results, whether it's committed.

Reviewer: Sync the orchestrator extension to ~/pi-files and commit. Run these bash commands:

1. `~/.pi/sync.sh` — syncs to ~/pi-files/extensions/orchestrator/
2. `cd ~/pi-files && git add -A && git status` — show staged files
3. `cd ~/pi-files && git commit -m "Fix checkFileSize blocking READ operations

checkFileSize in scope-guard.ts had no operation parameter — it blocked
ALL file access (including reads) when files exceeded maxLinesPerFile.
Added operation param: reads skip size check, writes still enforced.
Updated subagent-tool-guard.ts to pass operation type to checkFileSize.

4 new tests, 760 total passing, 0 regressions."`
4. `cd ~/pi-files && git push`
5. `cd ~/pi-files && git log --oneline -3` — confirm commit

Report commit hash and push status.
